description_long: This is a narrow, three-story apartment building with a steeply pitched, reddish-brown tiled roof and a facade adorned with blue and white patterned tiles, reminiscent of traditional Portuguese azulejos. The front features three vertically aligned sets of windows, each with decorative black wrought-iron balconies on the upper two floors, and a single blue-framed entrance door at the ground level. The side walls are plain and unadorned, with the patterned tiles wrapping only partially around the building. The rear of the building is completely featureless, finished in a plain, light-colored material. The windows are symmetrically arranged, and the overall structure is tall and slender, suggesting a dense urban environment. The building's style and materials evoke a classic European residential aesthetic, likely found in historic city neighborhoods.
description: A tall, narrow apartment building with blue and white patterned tiles, black wrought-iron balconies, and a steep reddish-brown tiled roof. The facade is symmetrical and richly detailed, while the sides and rear are plain.
description_view_0: The front view shows the ornate tiled facade, three sets of windows with black balconies, and a blue entrance door.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the patterned tiles extending partially along the wall and the steeply pitched roof, with balconies visible in profile.
description_view_2: The rear view is completely plain, with no windows, doors, or decorative elements, finished in a light, solid color.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the patterned tiles, roof slope, and balconies in profile.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in three vertical columns, with each floor featuring a single window per column, evenly spaced and aligned across the facade.
